# @voxgig/apidef

> Compiles an OpenAPI 3 / Swagger 2.0 spec into a normalized internal API
> model (entities, operations, fields, flows) that downstream tooling turns
> into client SDKs. It infers the resource/CRUD structure OpenAPI leaves
> implicit.

apidef has two implementations: the canonical TypeScript build under `ts/`
(the published npm package) and a Go parity port under `go/`. The pipeline is
`parse → guide → transform → builder → generate`. Node 24+.

## Start here
- [README](./README.md): project overview, install, quick example
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): orientation for AI agents (rules, commands, gotchas)
- [Documentation index](./docs/README.md): all docs, organized by purpose

## Tutorial
- [Getting started](./docs/tutorial/getting-started.md): install, generate a model from a small spec, read the output

## How-to guides
- [Use as a library](./docs/how-to/use-as-a-library.md): makeBuild / generate / parse; in-memory vs files; virtual fs
- [Use the CLI](./docs/how-to/use-the-cli.md): the voxgig-apidef binary
- [Customize entity naming](./docs/how-to/customize-entity-naming.md): custom.plurals overrides for singularization
- [Run only part of the pipeline](./docs/how-to/control-the-pipeline.md): ctrl.step flags
- [Debug a build](./docs/how-to/debug-a-build.md): warnings, debug output, why_* traces, common symptoms
- [Work on the codebase](./docs/how-to/work-on-the-codebase.md): contributor loop, TS-canonical + Go-parity workflow

## Reference
- [Programmatic API](./docs/reference/api.md): ApiDef, makeBuild, generate, options, result, exports
- [CLI](./docs/reference/cli.md): flags
- [Configuration & inputs](./docs/reference/configuration.md): model, build spec, ctrl.step, spec-file path rule
- [Internal API model](./docs/reference/model.md): entity / op / point / arg / field / flow shapes
- [Guide model](./docs/reference/guide.md): classification output and why_* traces
- [Pipeline stages](./docs/reference/pipeline.md): the five stages and nine transform passes

## Explanation
- [Architecture overview](./docs/explanation/architecture.md): stages, context, building blocks, two implementations
- [Classification heuristics](./docs/explanation/classification-heuristics.md): how paths become entities/ops/actions
- [The internal model](./docs/explanation/the-internal-model.md): why entities/ops/points/flows are shaped as they are
- [Canonical build & parity port](./docs/explanation/canonical-and-parity.md): TS is canonical, Go mirrors it

## Source
- [ts/src/apidef.ts](./ts/src/apidef.ts): pipeline entry point
- [ts/src/parse.ts](./ts/src/parse.ts): parse + $ref resolution
- [ts/src/guide/heuristic01.ts](./ts/src/guide/heuristic01.ts): the classification engine
- [ts/src/transform/](./ts/src/transform/): the nine transform passes
- [ts/src/utility.ts](./ts/src/utility.ts): pure helpers (depluralize, canonize, validator, formatJSONIC)
